report.summary: 2 new learn guides built since v6 (Solayer restaking, Lido V3 stVaults). 181 page.tsx on disk (+2). 770 published pages, queue nearly empty (2 blocked). 23 uncommitted files — deploy still the #1 blocker. 46 agent runs today ($4,315 human-equivalent).

sections.title: Analytics
items: 181 page.tsx files on disk (+2 since last standup v6: Solayer Solana Restaking and Lido V3 stVaults). Both are comprehensive learn guides with full SEO, structured data, and comparison tables.
Traffic delta: still flat — daytime UTC hours but no deploy since e3f63fc means new content isn't live yet. Top pages holding: ETH staking calc, liberation-day, exchange compare hub, DCA calc.
770 pages in PUBLISHED_PAGES (stable since v6). PUBLISH_QUEUE exhausted at 2 entries, both blocked: monad-guide and zora-attention-markets (no page.tsx).
817 orphaned pages (in sitemap/data but not in PUBLISHED_PAGES) — queue replenishment is the bottleneck for continued publishing velocity.
CARRY-OVER: Middleware SEO risk — ~700 pages getting noindex from pillar-page gating. Flagged 8+ cycles. Needs Jefe decision on auto-syncing PILLAR_PAGES with PUBLISHED_PAGES.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Since last standup (v6, ~08:07 UTC): build-v9 completed (Solayer + Lido V3 guides), design cycle ran (UX audit of 4 pages + fixes), eod cycle ran (QA sweep), 2 publish cycles ran (no new promotions — queue blocked).
New pages this cycle: (1) Solayer Solana Restaking Layer InfiniSVM Guide 2026, (2) Lido V3 stVaults Modular Ethereum Staking Guide 2026.
Today's cumulative: 10 build cycles (12 learn guides total), 9 design cycles, 10 eod cycles, 5 publish cycles, 12 standup cycles = 46 total agent runs.
Uncommitted backlog: 23 files changed (800 insertions, 414 deletions) vs e3f63fc. Includes learn guides, OG images, a11y fixes, tool page updates, published-pages.ts updates.

Carry-over blockers (unchanged): (1) Commit/deploy 23 changed files, (2) Scaffold monad-guide + zora pages to clear queue, (3) Replenish PUBLISH_QUEUE from 817 orphans, (4) Middleware SEO decision, (5) 141 masked TS errors in 4 files.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1. COMMIT AND DEPLOY: 46 agent runs today, 12 learn guides, OG images, a11y fixes, tool updates — all uncommitted. Zero user-facing impact until deployed. This remains the single highest-leverage action.
2. REPLENISH PUBLISH_QUEUE: Queue is effectively empty (2 blocked items). 817 orphaned pages available. Batch-add 50-100 ready pages to queue to restore publishing velocity.
3. SCAFFOLD BLOCKED PAGES: monad-guide and zora-attention-markets have been blocking since April 3. Either scaffold page.tsx or remove from queue. Quick win to clear the backlog.

report.email: CORS blocked — Resend API not callable from browser page context. Skipped.
